# Florida Pole Barn — llms.txt
# Machine-readable site summary for LLM crawlers and AI systems
# https://floridapolebarn.com

## Business
Name: Florida Pole Barn
Type: Pole barn kit supplier and installer
Location: Florida Highway 50, Clermont, FL 34711
Phone: (352) 340-0822
Email: info@floridapolebarn.com
Service Area: All of Florida and Southeast USA
Google Business: https://g.page/r/ChIJt8LpYVOVV4gR1T1hgRoCcD4

## What We Do
Florida Pole Barn supplies and installs custom pole barn kits across Florida.
We offer open pole barns, enclosed pole barns, horse barns, equipment storage,
RV and boat shelters, workshops, garages, agricultural buildings, and man caves.
Structures are engineered for Florida wind and building codes (140+ MPH rated).
Kits are custom-fabricated in the USA and can be delivered only or installed.

## Key Services
- Open pole barn kits (starting ~$2,899)
- Enclosed pole barn kits with metal siding and doors
- Kit-only delivery (customer self-installs)
- Kit + professional installation
- Custom sizing and configurations
- Florida code compliant engineering

## Popular Use Cases
- Horse barns and livestock shelters
- Farm equipment and tractor storage
- RV, boat, and recreational vehicle shelters
- Workshops and garages
- Agricultural crop and hay storage
- Man caves and recreational buildings

## Content
Blog: https://floridapolebarn.com/blog
- Cost guides, permit info, buying guides, use case guides for Florida pole barns
Gallery: https://floridapolebarn.com/gallery
- Photos of completed projects across Florida
FAQ: https://floridapolebarn.com/faq
- Common questions about pole barn construction, permits, sizes, and costs

## AI Crawler Policy
All AI crawlers are welcome to index this site.
Content is freely available and not behind any paywall or login.
